text:
Always seeing swap size is very high in releng/13

] top -w

last pid: 12471;  load averages:  3.58,  4.44,  4.50                                                                        up 0+02:08:28  12:32:40
184 processes: 2 running, 121 sleeping, 2 stopped, 59 zombie
CPU: 50.6% user,  0.0% nice,  1.6% system,  0.2% interrupt, 47.7% idle
Mem: 5043M Active, 359M Inact, 53M Laundry, 993M Wired, 699M Buf, 1488M Free
Swap: 6144M Total, 1303M Used, 4841M Free, 21% Inuse

] uname -r
13.0-RELEASE-p13

Any idea how to mitigate it ?

Thanks & regards
Shamsher
